name: Charles Saluski
focus: Research computing • Linux systems • Computer vision and data analysis
bio: Charles Saluski is a Research Computing System Administrator for the Radiant Center, where he supports advanced computational infrastructure for research and data-driven projects. With experience in software engineering, machine learning, systems administration, and networking, he specializes in designing, deploying, and maintaining scalable computing environments for academic use. Within the Center he manages computer and networking infrastructure and develops tools and methodologies to enable effective and resilient data analysis.
